relationships: kab:Yella wasmi i ken-yefka ubrid ɣer taddart-nneɣ﹖
kab:Yella kra ur neddi ara akken ilaq﹖
kab:Yella ḥedd i yellan tura neɣ yella yakan daki
kab:Yella wass i deg turareḍ aflipper ﹖
kab:Yella wass ideg turareḍ icahen akked Tom﹖
kab:Yella wass ideg turareḍ akked Tom urar n mmet-a-ccix﹖
kab:Yella wass ideg turareḍ ccix-mmet akked Tom﹖
kab:Yella ccek d ameqqran ur tetteddu ara ad teg afooting yid-s
kab:Yella ccek d ameqqran dakken mačči d nettat i ixedmen axeddim-nni
kab:Yella d acu i zemreɣ ad t-xedmeɣ i wakken ad tent-ɛiwneɣ﹖
